ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "company_brand" TEXT /* Company brand associated with the entry */,
  "product" TEXT /* Product name associated with the entry */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Technology used in the entry */,
  "rm" INTEGER /* Relative maturity (RM) of the entry */,
  "yield_bu_acre" REAL /* Yield in bushels per acre */,
  "moisture_percent" REAL /* Moisture percentage of the entry */,
  "lodging_percent" REAL /* Lodging percentage of the entry */,
  "stand_count" REAL /* Stand count of the entry */,
  "gross_income_acre" REAL /* Gross income per acre */,
  "income_rank" INTEGER /* Income rank of the entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region associated with the entry */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Farm associated with the entry */,
  "crop_type_id" INTEGER /* Crop type associated with the entry */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the entry was made */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_crop_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_type_id") REFERENCES crop_types ("crop_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_technology FOREIGN KEY ("technology") REFERENCES technologies ("technology_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_company_brand FOREIGN KEY ("company_brand") REFERENCES companies ("company_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the company entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the company entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the company entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the company entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the technology */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the technology entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the technology entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the technology entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the technology entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technologies_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technologies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the region entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the region entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the region entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the region entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region associated with the farm */,
  "farm_type" TEXT /* Type of the farm (e.g., organic, conventional) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the farm */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the farm */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the farm */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the farm */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the farm entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the farm entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the farm entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the farm entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farms_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farms_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farms_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_types" (
  "crop_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop type */,
  "crop_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the crop type entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the crop type entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the crop type entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the crop type entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_types_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, farmer, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the user entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the user entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
